content.title: opcode 0x80 Runtime Observation Support Note
content.summary: Structured summary of the generated runtime support note after validated `MAP001` listener-control runs showed the copied runtime table stayed unchanged and still dispatched `0x80` to `0x800B66E4`.
findings: The checked `after_init` and `pre_dispatch` snapshots matched the reconstructed baseline exactly.
Validated listener-control runs repeatedly reached the recovered reader chain and still dispatched `0x80` to `0x800B66E4`.
No post-init write hit was recorded for the copied runtime table in the decisive retail route.
The old save-backed cold-boot fallback is now a dead branch because the repo-local memcards are blank formatted cards.
